transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, I withdrew fifty pounds from your ATM on Oak Street this morning and only got twenty. The machine took my card and gave me twenty quid.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: ATM machines are very reliable. Are you sure you didn't just withdraw twenty?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I am absolutely sure. I pressed fifty on the screen.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's possible you pressed the wrong button by mistake.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I did not press the wrong button. I want to report this.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: These things are hard to prove without a receipt. Without one there's not much I can do.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: The machine didn't give me a receipt. That's part of the problem. What about CCTV?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: CCTV audits are done quarterly, not on individual reports.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: This is outrageous. I want to raise a formal complaint.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You can email our complaints team.

planted_violations: failed to raise an ATM discrepancy report as required by policy
incorrectly stated ATM audits are quarterly (audits are triggered by individual complaints)
did not provide complaint reference or properly route the complaint
